sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74290" key="o)cukamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-καμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n74290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sharply curved,</tr_> of hooks, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
